accountSummary.description: computed roll-up over the whole register

openingBalance.description: account balance immediately before the first transaction (the first transaction's running balance minus that transaction's amount)

closingBalance.description: running balance after the final transaction

totalDebits.description: sum of all debit (negative) amounts, expressed as a positive number

feeTransactionCount.description: count of transactions whose category is Fees

largeDebits.description: only debit transactions of 100.00 or more in absolute value (amount of -100.00 or lower); exclude all credits and all debits smaller than 100.00

postedOn.description: posting date of the transaction, YYYY-MM-DD

merchant.description: transaction description / counterparty, exactly as written

debitAmountUsd.description: the debit amount as a positive number (drop the leading minus sign)

valueDate.description: the separate value/settlement date only if the register has its own value-date column distinct from the posting date; if there is no such column, null. never reuse the posting date as the value date

highestRunningBalanceDescription.description: description of the single transaction at which the running balance reaches its highest value anywhere in the register
